creator: pirzyk@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Carlo Strub from comment #1)
> The new website seems to be: http://www.feep.net/psgconf/
> 
> Can you provide a patch to update this port to the latest version?

feep.net version (0.8.5) < current version of 3.3 and this version does not support FreeBSD at all, it started with 0.9.0 version.  See attached ChangeLog for details.
